briefs.title: BC Streamlines Permitting for High-Output Wind and Solar Energy Projects Over 5 MW
briefs.summary: BC updated its renewable energy permitting rules, creating a faster 'level 3' approval track for wind and solar projects with a capacity greater than 5 MW. Smaller projects follow the existing 'level 2' process.
briefs.action_required: Check which permitting level applies to your renewable energy project based on its capacity (MW output).

key_dates.label: BC Streamlined Permitting Regulation amendments take effect
